ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "time_generated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was reported */,
  "incident_guid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the incident report was created */,
  "preview_url" TEXT /* URL to a preview or summary of the incident */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of cybersecurity event */,
  "event_type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event type */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Current status of the incident (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "incident_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., data breach, malware, phishing) */,
  "incident_source" TEXT /* Source of the incident report (e.g., internal, external, automated) */,
  "incident_impact_level" TEXT /* Impact level of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high, critical) */,
  "incident_response_team" TEXT /* Assigned response team for the incident */,
  "incident_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was resolved */,
  "incident_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments related to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_guid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "company_industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "company_location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the company */,
  "company_contact_information" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "company_security_rating" TEXT /* Security rating of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_companies" (
  "incident_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between an incident and a company */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "relation_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship between the incident and the company (e.g., breached, dependent) */,
  "incident_impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact on the company */,
  "incident_mitigation_steps" TEXT /* Steps taken to mitigate the incident */,
  "incident_recovery_plan" TEXT /* Recovery plan for the company */,
  "incident_communication_plan" TEXT /* Communication plan for notifying affected parties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_companies_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_companies_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company offering the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_types" TEXT /* Types of the product */,
  "relationship_source" TEXT /* Source of the relationship information */,
  "product_version" TEXT /* Version of the product */,
  "product_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  "product_security_features" TEXT /* Security features of the product */,
  "product_vulnerabilities" TEXT /* Known vulnerabilities of the product */,
  "product_support_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for product support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
